title: Marshlaw's Custom Totems
description: This Mod Adds New Custom Totems With Special Abilities
body:
![Marshlaw's Custom Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c27cb6e718e4ab56697048c1aef6859b1f2fa024.png)

# **This Mod Add Custom Totems To Minecraft**
## You Can Get Totems By Killing Mobs
Custom Totems Gives Custom Loot + Effect. Every Totem Has Diffrent loot! This Loot Can Speed Up youre Gameplay! This Mod Is For Fun and Not For Challenges. This Mod is Specially Unbalanced

### **Totems**
- Warden Totem
- Blaze Totem
- Iron Golem Totem
- Skeleton Totem
- Pig Totem
- Cow Totem
- Chicken Totem
- Zombie Totem
- Creeper Totem
- Spider Totem
- Dragon Totem

  ![Totems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f0fcccf33a79e0edfd864d326ceabf123d1d7bb.png)

Its Still In **[BETA]** Report Any Bugs
Consider Donating

https://buymeacoffee.com/marshlaw
